body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42359", "cvss": {"score": 8.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-502", "name": "Deserialization of Untrusted Data"}], "description": "A bug in Apache Airflow's XCom PATCH endpoint `PATCH /api/v2/xcomEntries/{key}` allowed an authenticated UI/API user with XCom write permission on a Dag to set XCom entries under reserved key names (e.g. `return_value`) that the matching POST endpoint already validated against `FORBIDDEN_XCOM_KEYS`. The endpoint also accepted serialized payload shapes the triggerer's deserializer treats as code; combined, this allowed RCE on the triggerer when the affected task next deferred. Affects deployments where untrusted users have XCom write permission on Dags that defer to the triggerer. This is a fix-bypass of CVE-2026-33858: PR #64148 added the `FORBIDDEN_XCOM_KEYS` validator only on the POST/set path; the PATCH path was not covered. Users who already upgraded for CVE-2026-33858 should additionally upgrade to `apache-airflow` 3.2.2 or later to cover the PATCH-path bypass.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0055, "percentile": 0.41617}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wr76-29cr-67w8", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-09T21:03:20Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wr76-29cr-67w8", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wr76-29cr-67w8"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42359"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-01T09:16:18Z", "published_at": "2026-06-01T09:31:14Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42359", "https://github.com/apache/airflow/pull/65915", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/g8dqykpf1p90tysq8tln4qtkqwb1038s", "https://www.cve.org/CVERecord?id=CVE-2026-33858", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/apache-airflow/PYSEC-2026-185.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wr76-29cr-67w8"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/airflow", "summary": "Apache Airflow has a Deserialization of Untrusted Data vulnerability", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-09T21:03:20Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-wr76-29cr-67w8", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.2.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "apache-airflow"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.2.0, < 3.2.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Apache Airflow has a Deserialization of Untrusted Data vulnerability
